/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/tests.dir/tests/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/Bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/CrewMember.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/Route.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/Trip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/User.cpp.o -o /home/hhlbby/Документы/TPMP/515team_code/bin/tests  lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lpthread lib/libgtest.a
